title: RedMan
description: Added Redman and Monsters to your Minecraft!
body:
# Mod Introduction：

This mod was developed using MCreator.

Geckolib is required as a front！

Added many villains from the Ultraman series to your Minecraft.（Such as Ultraman Belial, Juda, Alien 
Mefilas and other popular characters.）

A large number of evil villains have been added to the mod.

All you need to do is right-click on the Red Pass to transform into Redman

As you play, transform into a red hero and fight villains!

# Precautions：

It is recommended to back up your saved game before playing this mod, as it may cause your game to crash.

# FAQ:

Can I include Redman in my mod pack?

Of course can!
